description: Cross-language cryptography test vectors for DKSAP, stealth addresses, view tags, metadata encoding, leaf hashing, and nullifiers. Only verified values are included.

poseidon_pair.description: Poseidon(1, 2) over BN254 scalar field. Matches circomlib poseidon(2) output. Verified: Rust scanner/src/merkle.rs and TypeScript circomlibjs.

poseidon_zero_pair.description: Poseidon(0, 0). Used as Merkle zero hash at level 0. Verified in Rust tests.

v1_metadata_encoding.description: V1 attestation metadata wire format: view_tag(1) || 0xA7(1) || attestation_id(8 big-endian). Verified in Rust attestation roundtrip tests.

v2_metadata_encoding.description: V2 attestation metadata wire format: view_tag(1) || 0xB2(1) || schema_id(32) || issuer(32) || attestation_uid(32) || nonce(32) || expiration_ledger(4 big-endian). Verified in Rust encode/decode tests.

schema_id.description: Canonical schema ID derivation. SHA-256(authority || name || version_be_u32 || canonical_field_defs). Verified across Rust schema-registry and TS schemaEncoding tests.
